learn.description: Scan project and update CONTEXT.md for cross-session memory
learn.template: Load the project-context skill and execute /learn: scan the project structure, read key files, understand current state, and update CONTEXT.md with everything a future session needs to resume work without re-discovery.

status.description: Show current project context from CONTEXT.md
status.template: Read CONTEXT.md and summarize the current project state, active tasks, and next steps. If CONTEXT.md doesn't exist, run the /learn command first.
